transcript.content: ugh i just need to vent for a second. today was such a disaster at work. my boss dumped a bunch of last-minute reports on my desk right as i was about to leave, and my computer kept crashing the entire time i was trying to finish them. i just feel so drained.
I feel your pain man . I am so drained of everything I could do to get this done ...
right? it's just so exhausting. and honestly it's not even just today, it feels like everything has just been piling up lately and i can't ever catch my breath.

thanks, i appreciate you saying that. it's just hard because honestly idk why i even bother anymore. like i work so hard and nothing ever changes.

yeah... it's just that nothing really feels worth it lately. i wake up, go to work, come home, and repeat. i don't even know what i'm working toward anymore.
